message: test(config): add golden artifact tests for redis.conf parsing [frankenredis-qtx2]

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,60 @@
+ParsedConfigFile {

+        ParsedConfigDirective {
+            line_number: 1,
+            name: [
+                112,
+                111,
+                114,
+                116,
+            ],
+            args: [
+                [
+                    54,

+                ],
+            ],
+        },
+        ParsedConfigDirective {
+            line_number: 2,
+            name: [
+                98,
+                105,
+                110,
+                100,
+            ],
+            args: [

+                    46,
+                    48,
+                    46,
+                    49,
+                ],

+        },

+                111,
+                117,

+}
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+Error: ConfigFileParseError {
+    line_number: 1,
+    reason: InvalidQuotedToken,
+    line: "requirepass \"unclosed quote",
+}
\ No newline at end of file
